cases.source_text:
--- Page 1 ---
The contractor shall encrypt all stored customer data using an agency-approved algorithm.

items.requirement_text: The contractor shall encrypt all stored customer data using an agency-approved algorithm.

cases.source_text:
--- Page 1 ---
The offeror must provide a disaster recovery plan.

items.requirement_text: The offeror must provide a disaster recovery plan.

cases.source_text:
--- Page 2 ---
Describe the proposed approach to stakeholder engagement.

items.requirement_text: Describe the proposed approach to stakeholder engagement.

cases.source_text:
--- Page 3 ---
The technical volume shall not exceed twenty pages and must use 11-point Arial font.

items.requirement_text: The technical volume shall not exceed twenty pages and must use 11-point Arial font.

cases.source_text:
--- Page 4 ---
The offeror must attach a signed conflicts-of-interest certification to Volume I.

items.requirement_text: The offeror must attach a signed conflicts-of-interest certification to Volume I.

cases.source_text:
--- Page 5 ---
Technical approach will be evaluated at 60 points; past performance will be evaluated at 40 points.

items.requirement_text: Technical approach will be evaluated at 60 points; past performance will be evaluated at 40 points.

cases.source_text:
--- Page 6 ---
SECTION L — PROPOSAL INSTRUCTIONS
The offeror shall submit one technical volume.

items.requirement_text: The offeror shall submit one technical volume.

cases.source_text:
--- Page 7 ---
The contractor shall deliver monthly status reports that include schedule, risk, cost, and quality metrics.

items.requirement_text: The contractor shall deliver monthly status reports that include…

cases.source_text:
--- Page 8 ---
The contractor shall maintain a staffed service desk during business hours.

items.requirement_text: The contractor shall maintain a staffed service desk during business hours.
The contractor shall maintain a staffed service desk during business hours.

cases.source_text:
--- Page 9 ---
The contractor shall comply with NIST SP 800-53 controls.
The offeror must include a current SOC 2 Type II report with its submission.

items.requirement_text: The contractor shall comply with NIST SP 800-53 controls.

missing_requirements.requirement_text: The offeror must include a current SOC 2 Type II report with its submission.

cases.source_text:
--- Page 10 ---
The offeror shall address each item below:
Describe the transition approach.
Provide the staffing schedule.

--- Page 11 ---
Offerors shall enter fully burdened hourly rates for every labor category in the supplied pricing workbook.

missing_requirements.requirement_text: Offerors shall enter fully burdened hourly rates for every labor category in the supplied pricing workbook.
